content.full_text:
October 29, 1990

Ms. Linda Cassidy  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
Technical Assistance Division  
PO Box 807  
Sacramento, California 95804

Dear Ms. Cassidy:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation this afternoon, this letter will confirm that a controlled political committee can transfer unlimited funds to the ballot measure fund of a general recipient committee which maintains funds both to aid local candidates and support and oppose ballot measures. You opined that no restrictions would apply to such contributions provided that the general recipient committee only uses its ballot measure fund to support or oppose ballot measures.

Please contact me immediately if I have failed accurately to characterize your advice in any respect. Thank you for your assistance.

Very truly yours,

Edward J. Weiss  
Manatt, Phelps & Phillips

EJW/kw
